overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in blue clothing exploring a gothic cathedral interior. The character walks along sunlit upper balconies with ornate stained glass windows casting golden light patterns, then transitions into darker torch-lit stone corridors.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper cathedral balcony with stained glass windows

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sunlit upper balcony toward a distant figure, with stained glass casting colored light patterns on the floor

entered.detail: tall ornate stained glass windows with blue and gold patterns casting light onto the walkway
dark wooden balustrade running along the edge of the balcony
long red carpet laid down the center of the stone walkway
ornate stone columns with carved capitals supporting the cathedral structure

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated balcony inside a gothic cathedral, with golden afternoon light streaming through tall stained glass windows on the right. A red carpet runs down the center of the marble floor, and ornate stone pillars line the left side of the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: corner balcony with large rose window and narrow passage

events.description: character turns right at the end of the balcony walkway
character climbs over the wooden railing to squeeze through a narrow passage beside the rose window

agents.ego_description: turning the corner along the balcony, then climbing over the railing to navigate a tight ledge beside the ornate rose window

entered.detail: large circular stained glass rose window with intricate blue and red patterns
tight walkway between the wooden railing and the stone wall
arched stone doorway leading into darkness at the end of the passage

segments.scene_description: The character turns right at the balcony corner, passing a magnificent rose window that fills the space with colored light. The character then climbs over the railing to squeeze along a narrow ledge, approaching a dark arched doorway while the stained glass remains visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark stone corridor with rough block walls

events.description: character enters dark corridor, transitioning from golden sunlight to dim torchlight
fully enters the narrow stone passage with rough hewn block walls

agents.ego_description: walking into the dark stone corridor, passing a lit wall torch as the environment shifts from ornate cathedral to rough stone passage

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone blocks forming the corridor walls
lit torch mounted on the stone wall providing flickering orange light
stone archway marking the transition between the balcony and corridor

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the arched doorway into a narrow, dark corridor with rough stone block walls. The warm sunlight and stained glass give way to the flickering orange glow of a wall-mounted torch as the character moves deeper into the cathedral's interior passages.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sun-drenched gothic cathedral balcony that gradually descends into the oppressive gloom of a stone corridor. It begins with the character walking along an elevated marble walkway, where golden afternoon light streams through tall stained glass windows to illuminate a central red carpet. As the character turns a corner, the scene opens up to a magnificent rose window casting colored light before the camera follows the character climbing over a railing to squeeze along a narrow ledge. The perspective then shifts through a dark arched doorway, leaving the vibrant stained glass behind. Finally, the warm sunlight gives way to the flickering orange glow of wall-mounted torches as the character moves deeper into a narrow passage of rough stone blocks.
